subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful unto him who hath believed in God when He came with the truth, with a sovereignty that made the very foundations of the earth to tremble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن آمن بالله اذ اتی بالحق بسلطان اضطربت منه فرائص الارض
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
